effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对一名区域里有牌的其他角色使用。弃置该角色区域内的一张牌。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on another character who has at least one card in any zone. Discard one card from that character's zone.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对一名有手牌的其他角色使用。该角色展示一张手牌，然后你可以弃置一张与展示牌颜色相同的手牌，令该角色受到1点火焰伤害。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on another character who has hand cards. That character reveals one hand card. You may discard a hand card of the same suit to deal 1 fire damage to them.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对一名装备区里有武器牌的其他角色使用，并指定另一名在其攻击范围内的角色。除非该角色对另一名角色使用一张【杀】，否则将该角色的武器牌交给你。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on another character with a weapon equipped, and designate a second character within their attack range. Unless the first character uses a [Kill] on the second, their weapon is given to you.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对一名其他角色使用。由该角色先出，然后你们依次轮流打出一张【杀】，直到其中一名角色无法打出【杀】时，该角色受到1点伤害（来源为另一名角色）。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on another character. That character plays a [Kill] first, then you alternate. The first player unable to play a [Kill] takes 1 damage from the other.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对所有其他角色使用。这些角色须依次各打出一张【杀】，否则受到1点伤害。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on all other characters. Each character must play a [Kill] or take 1 damage.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对距离为1的一名区域里有牌的其他角色使用。你获得该角色区域内的一张牌。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on another character at distance 1 who has at least one card in any zone. You gain one card from that character's zone.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对所有角色使用。所有角色依次各回复1点体力。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on all characters. Each character recovers 1 health in turn.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对一至两名角色使用。目标角色横置或重置。(被横置的角色处于“连环状态”）
重铸：出牌阶段，你可以将此牌置入弃牌堆，然后摸一张牌。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on one or two characters. Each target is either turned sideways (chained) or reset to upright (unchained). Chained characters who take elemental damage pass that same damage to all other chained characters. Chain status is cleared immediately after elemental damage transmits.
Recast: During your Action Phase, you may discard this card to draw 1 card instead. Recasting is not considered using this tool card.

faq.q_cn: 连环状态是按配对记录的吗？
faq.a_cn: 不是。连环状态是全局的，所有连环角色视为同一组。任意连环角色受到属性伤害时，所有其他连环角色都受到等量伤害。
faq.q_en: Is chain status tracked in specific pairs?
faq.a_en: No. Chain status is global — all chained characters form one group. Elemental damage to any one of them transmits to all others regardless of how they were linked.

faq.q_cn: 可以只选择1名角色使用此牌吗？
可以同时横置一名角色并重置另一名角色吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。此牌切换每名目标各自的当前状态，两名目标独立结算。
faq.q_en: Can I chain one character and unchain another with the same card?
faq.a_en: Yes. The card toggles each target's state independently — an unchained target becomes chained and vice versa.

faq.q_cn: 【无懈可击】可以抵消【铁索连环】吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以，但只能针对一名目标——它令该目标不成为此次【铁索连环】的目标，从而阻止其状态被改变。另一名目标的状态仍会改变。重铸时不能使用【无懈可击】。
faq.a_en: Yes, but only for one target at a time — it removes that target from the card's effect, preventing their state from changing. The other target's state still changes. [Nullification] cannot be used against a Reforge.

faq.q_cn: 连环角色的攻击被【闪】躲避后，其他连环角色需要响应吗？
faq.a_cn: 不需要。连环只传递伤害，未造成伤害则不触发。
faq.q_en: If an attack on a chained character is dodged, do other chained characters need to respond?
faq.a_en: No. Chains only transmit damage — if no damage is dealt, the chain does not trigger.

faq.q_cn: 藤甲与连环伤害如何互动？
faq.a_cn: 传递的伤害等于原始受击者实际受到的伤害。若藤甲使其受到2点伤害，其他连环角色也受到2点伤害。
faq.q_en: How does Vine Armor interact with chain damage?
faq.a_en: Transmitted damage matches what the original target actually receives. If Vine Armor raises their damage to 2, all other chained characters also receive 2.

faq.q_cn: 【过河拆桥】或【顺手牵羊】能解除连环状态吗？
faq.a_cn: 不能。连环状态是武将牌的横置状态，不是一张牌，无法被弃置或获取。唯一能切换连环状态的方式是再次对该角色使用【铁索连环】（令其重置）。
faq.a_en: No. Chain status is a positional state of the general card (horizontally placed), not a card that can be discarded or taken. The only way to toggle chain status is to use [Iron Shackles] on that character again (which Resets them).

faq.q_cn: 重铸时，黄月英能额外摸一张牌吗？
faq.a_cn: 不能。重铸不被视为使用锦囊牌，黄月英的技能不会触发。
faq.q_en: Can Huang Yue Ying draw an extra card when [Iron Shackles] is Reforged?
faq.a_en: No. Reforging is not considered using a tool card, so Huang Yue Ying's skill does not trigger.

faq.q_cn: 使用【铁索连环】有距离限制吗？
faq.a_cn: 没有，可以对任意角色使用。
faq.q_en: Is there a range restriction when using [Iron Shackles]?
faq.a_en: No. [Iron Shackles] can target any character regardless of distance.

faq.q_cn: 若多名连环角色同时死亡，结算顺序是什么？
faq.a_cn: 按从使用者开始逆时针方向的顺序依次结算。
faq.q_en: If multiple chained characters die simultaneously, what is the elimination order?

faq.q_cn: 主公通过连环伤害间接杀死忠臣，需要弃置所有手牌和装备牌吗？
faq.a_cn: 需要。主公仍是伤害来源，无论是否通过连环传导。
faq.q_en: If the Ruler kills a Loyalist through chain damage, do they still discard all cards?
faq.a_en: Yes. The Ruler is still the damage source regardless of whether it was direct or transmitted.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对所有其他角色使用。这些角色须依次各打出一张【闪】，否则受到1点伤害。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on all other characters. Each character must play a [Dodge] in turn or take 1 damage.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对所有角色使用。从牌堆顶亮出等同于现存角色数量的牌，所有角色依次各选择并获得其中一张牌，多余的牌置入弃牌堆。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on all characters. Reveal a number of cards from the deck equal to the number of players. Each character in turn selects and gains one card; leftover cards are discarded.

effect_cn: 当一张锦囊牌生效前，抵消该锦囊牌的效果；或抵消一张【无懈可击】的效果。
effect_en: When a tool card is about to take effect, negate its effect; or negate another [Nullification].

faq.q_cn: 一张【无懈可击】可以抵消群体锦囊对所有人的效果吗？
faq.a_cn: 不可以。针对群体锦囊，一张【无懈可击】只能保护一名目标，保护多人需对每人分别使用。
faq.q_en: Does one [Nullification] cancel an AOE card for everyone?
faq.a_en: No. One [Nullification] only protects one target. A separate [Nullification] is needed for each person you want to protect.

faq.q_cn: 我可以在同一次群体锦囊中使用多张【无懈可击】吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。每名目标的结算是独立时机，手牌充足时可分别打出多张保护不同角色。
faq.q_en: Can I use multiple [Nullification] cards during one AOE resolution?
faq.a_en: Yes. Each target resolves independently — you can play separate [Nullification] cards for different people as long as you have them.

faq.q_cn: 对【五谷丰登】使用【无懈可击】会发生什么？
faq.a_cn: 被抵消的目标跳过摸牌，其原本可拿的牌留在牌堆供后续角色选取。
faq.q_en: What happens if [Nullification] is used during [Harvest]?
faq.a_en: The target is skipped and cannot choose a card. The card they would have taken remains in the pool for later players.

faq.q_cn: 【桃园结义】被【无懈可击】抵消后，其他角色还能回血吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。【无懈可击】只影响被指定的那一名目标，其他角色仍正常回血。
faq.q_en: If [Peach Garden] is nullified for one person, do the others still recover health?
faq.a_en: Yes. [Nullification] only affects the one target it is played against — all other players still recover health normally.

faq.q_cn: 对方用【无懈可击】抵消我的【无懈可击】，会影响其他人的结算吗？
faq.a_cn: 不会。反制只决定当前目标是否受影响，不影响群体锦囊对其他角色的后续结算。
faq.q_en: If my [Nullification] is countered, does it affect other players in the AOE?
faq.a_en: No. The counter only resolves the interaction for the current target — it does not affect the AOE card's resolution for anyone else.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对自己使用。你摸两张牌。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on yourself. Draw 2 cards.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对距离为1的一名其他角色使用。将【兵粮寸断】置入该角色的判定区。该角色判定阶段，若判定结果不为梅花，其跳过本回合的摸牌阶段。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on another character at distance 1. Place [Starvation] into that character's judgment area. During their Judgment Phase, if the result is not a club, that character skips their Draw Phase this turn.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对一名其他角色使用。将【乐不思蜀】置入该角色的判定区。该角色判定阶段，若判定结果不为红桃，其跳过本回合的出牌阶段。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on another character. Place [Acedia] into that character's judgment area. During their Judgment Phase, if the result is not a heart, that character skips their Action Phase this turn.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对自己使用。将【闪电】置入你的判定区。你的判定阶段，若判定结果为黑桃2至9，你受到3点雷电伤害；否则将【闪电】移至下家的判定区。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on yourself. Place [Lightning] into your judgment area. During your Judgment Phase, if the result is a spade between 2 and 9, you take 3 lightning damage; otherwise, move [Lightning] to the next player's judgment area.
